about.title: About Me
about.intro: Technology enthusiast with {yearsIT}+ years of IT experience and {yearsDev}+ years in software development, building innovative and scalable solutions.
journey: I enjoy coding, playing videogames, watching anime, and talking about technology, even better with coffee.
More than {yearsIT} years ago I started my IT career, working across support, infrastructure, communication, and systems.
Over the last {yearsDev} years, I have focused on software development, specializing in backend solutions that are robust, scalable, and secure.

backend.title: Back-End Developer
backend.description: Specialized in Java, Spring, and Apache Camel technologies

enterprise.title: Enterprise Experience
enterprise.description: Delivered corporate solutions for public and private sectors

team.title: Team Collaboration
team.description: Worked in multidisciplinary teams and agile methodologies

quality.title: Quality Focus
quality.description: Committed to clean code, scalability, and best practices

experience.title: Professional Experience
experience.subtitle: A brief summary of my journey

gft.description: Development and maintenance of critical Java systems, building and evolving REST APIs and microservices using Spring Boot and Apache Camel. Work on complex enterprise integrations with Kafka, Azure Service Bus/Event Hub, and IBM MQ, applying resilience patterns, idempotency, and distributed architecture. Collaboration in agile squads, contributing to application modernization, observability, troubleshooting, and continuous delivery across cloud and on‑premise environments.

orlandia.description: Process automation and optimization of critical operational routines using SQL, reducing execution time and ensuring accuracy in tax calculations and banking integrations. Work in data analysis, business rule validation, system homologation, and technical support for operational teams. Administrative experience applying systems thinking, documentation, configuration, and continuous improvement to enhance reliability and efficiency.

footer.tagline: Backend developer passionate about building innovative and high-scale solutions.
footer.talkText: Want to talk about technology, systems, and Java?

hero.name: Luis Zancanela
hero.title: Crafting resilient Java systems, advanced integrations, and modern TypeScript experiences.
hero.subtitle: Critical APIs • Microservices • Integrations • Cloud • React/Next.js when the challenge needs a strong interface
hero.description: I turn complex systems into stable, scalable, and easy-to-evolve solutions. My focus is backend Java, but I also deliver front-end work with real UX, performance, and visual consistency awareness.

projects.title: Projects
projects.cta: Interested in seeing more projects or discussing a collaboration?

ebooks.title: Published E‑books
ebooks.description: E‑books on technology and software development published on LinkedIn.

javaVersions.title: Java Bushidō – From Java 8 to 25 (Java Bushidō - Do Java 8 ao 25: cortes precisos na evolução)
javaVersions.description: A practical guide explaining the evolution of Java from version 8 to 25, presenting the most important features in a clear and progressive way. This e‑book is available in Brazilian Portuguese.

kubernetes.title: The Company of Infinite Deploys (A Empresa dos Deploys Infinitos: Onde os Microserviços Nunca Dormem)
kubernetes.description: A didactic explanation of Kubernetes using the analogy of a company, making concepts like pods, nodes, workloads, and autoscaling intuitive. This e‑book is available in Brazilian Portuguese.

apacheCamel.title: The Awakening of the Java Warrior (O Despertar do Guerreiro Java: A Arte Shinobi dos Microsserviços Apache Camel)
apacheCamel.description: A microservices architecture built with Java and Apache Camel, demonstrating asynchronous communication between services with Spring Boot integration. This e‑book is available in Brazilian Portuguese.

github.title: GitHub Projects
github.description: The top {totalProjects} public projects from my GitHub, ranked by stars and forks.

contact.title: Let's Talk?
contact.subtitle: I'm always open to discussing technology, new projects, or creative opportunities.
contact.availabilityText: Always available to collaborate on projects, answer questions, or explore new ideas. Constantly learning new technologies. Feel free to reach out.
